pattern: For each outer letter, the distinct characters strictly between its first and last occurrence count the palindromes it can frame.
hints: A length-three palindrome is fixed by its outer letter and its middle letter.
For a chosen outer letter, only its first and last positions matter; anything between them can be a middle.
Sum over the 26 letters the number of distinct characters appearing strictly between that letter's first and last index.

edge_inputs.description: outer letter appears only once anywhere
single distinct middle between outer pair

stress.description: random strings over a small alphabet to force repeated outer letters
